soilPreparation.title: Turang Zhunbei De Zhongyao Jiqiao
soilPreparation.excerpt: Xuexi zhuanye soil preparation fangfa, wei farming season tigao yield...
soilPreparation.author: Admin
points: Jiqiao: Choose the right tiller for your soil type.
Jiqiao: Remove weeds and leftover crop residue before planting.
Jiqiao: Maintain proper soil moisture before tilling.
Jiqiao: Use cultivators for better aeration and root growth.
Jiqiao: Break large soil clods before seed placement.
Jiqiao: Level the field to avoid waterlogging in low spots.
Jiqiao: Add compost or organic manure before final cultivation.
Jiqiao: Avoid working soil when it is too wet or sticky.
Jiqiao: Check soil pH and correct nutrient imbalance early.
Jiqiao: Prepare raised beds for vegetables and delicate crops.
Jiqiao: Keep tiller blades clean and sharp for uniform soil mixing.
Jiqiao: Use shallow cultivation around existing roots.
Jiqiao: Plan drainage channels before the rainy season.
Jiqiao: Rotate crops to maintain soil health.
Jiqiao: Do a final light pass before sowing for smooth seed beds.

powerTools.title: Weihu Nide Dongli Gongju
powerTools.excerpt: Qingjie he weihu industrial power tools de wanzheng guide, tigao shouming he safety...
powerTools.author: Agri Expert
points: Jiqiao: Clean tools after every use.
Jiqiao: Remove soil, dust, and crop residue from blades.
Jiqiao: Check engine oil before starting.
Jiqiao: Clean or replace air filters regularly.
Jiqiao: Tighten loose nuts, bolts, and screws.
Jiqiao: Sharpen blades when cutting performance decreases.
Jiqiao: Check fuel lines for leakage.
Jiqiao: Store tools in a dry and shaded place.
Jiqiao: Lubricate moving parts regularly.
Jiqiao: Inspect power cables and switches.
Jiqiao: Replace damaged blades immediately.
Jiqiao: Use only recommended fuel or power source.
Jiqiao: Avoid overloading the machine.
Jiqiao: Follow manufacturer safety instructions.
Jiqiao: Service the tool at regular intervals.

irrigation.title: Xiandai Guanga Gishu
irrigation.excerpt: Tansuo gaibian India modern agriculture de water-saving irrigation systems...
irrigation.author: Editor
points: Jiqiao: Use drip irrigation to save water in row crops.
Jiqiao: Maintain pumps and filters regularly.
Jiqiao: Choose quality hoses, pipes, and connectors.
Jiqiao: Monitor water pressure during irrigation.
Jiqiao: Install filters before drip lines to reduce clogging.
Jiqiao: Flush drip pipes at regular intervals.
Jiqiao: Use sprinklers for even coverage in open fields.
Jiqiao: Select pump capacity based on field size and head height.
Jiqiao: Repair leaks quickly to prevent water loss.
Jiqiao: Schedule irrigation early morning or evening.
Jiqiao: Group crops with similar water needs together.
Jiqiao: Use rain guns for larger field coverage.
Jiqiao: Check nozzles for blockage before every cycle.
Jiqiao: Protect pipes from direct damage during field operations.
Jiqiao: Track soil moisture before increasing watering time.
